name_cn:
Apricot
Envelope_ Caviar Envelope Bag. A super practical small bag, the most classic style, Italian imported cowhide paired with exquisite craftsmanship; custom metal Y logo highlights individuality; flip-top design ensures security; small bag with large capacity, featuring 20 card slots, two bill compartments, two central compartments, and one zippered interior pocket, holding everything!
Model: 620280
Size: 22.5x14x4cm
